title: U Mass - Glucose Measurement Protocol
author: Jason Kim
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.xw5fpg6
materials: When value is reached, accept calibration.
The final calculated value should be ~144 mg/dl.

steps.title: Check waste and fill glucose reagent reservoir
steps.instruction: Check waste and fill glucose reagent reservoir.

steps.title: Press “Enter”, and then “No” to cycle the Analox Analyzer
steps.instruction: Press “Enter”, and then “No” to cycle the Analox Analyzer.

steps.title: When cycling is finished, wait for...
steps.instruction: When cycling is finished, wait for reading to return to ~0 mg/dl (±1mg/dl).

steps.title: Using precision pipet, inject 10 µl of standard solution
steps.instruction: Using precision pipet, inject 10 µl of standard solution.

steps.title: When reading has returned to ~0...
steps.instruction: When reading has returned to ~0 mg/dl, inject 10 µl of standard solution, and ensure that the value is ~144 mg/dl.

steps.title: Repeat steps #5~#9 until calibration value is stable
steps.instruction: Repeat steps #5~#9 until calibration value is stable.

steps.title: Check calibration by injecting 5 µl...
steps.instruction: Check calibration by injecting 5 µl of standard and multiplying reported value by 2.

steps.title: Instrument is now ready for sample measurement
steps.instruction: Instrument is now ready for sample measurement. Use 5 or 10 µl of plasma sample for glucose concentration measurement.
